---
title: ""
author: "Giorgio Arcara"
date: ""
format:
  beamer:
    theme: metropolis
    keep-tex: true
incremental: false
header-includes:
  \setbeamerfont{title}{size=\large}
  \usepackage{hyperref}
  \setbeamertemplate{footline}[frame number]

---

```{=latex}
% TITLE SLIDES
\title{Clinical Research Methodology\\ \vspace{1em} \emph{A. Activity}}
\author{Giorgio Arcara,\\ University of Padua \\ IRCCS San Camillo, Venice}

\titlegraphic{

\vspace*{7cm}
\includegraphics[scale=0.15]{../Figures/LogoSanCamilloIRCCS_Unipd_alpha.png}
\begin{center}
\vspace{-2.2em}
\includegraphics[scale=0.15]{../Figures/CC_license_3_0.png}
\end{center}
}
\date{\today}
\maketitle
```

##
```{=latex}
\begin{center}
{\Large \textbf{Why are tests needed in (neuro)psychology?}\\ 5 main reasons}

\includegraphics[width=0.3\linewidth]{../Figures/Padlet_properties_qr_code.png}
\end{center}
```

##
```{=latex}
\begin{center}
{\Large \textbf{Why are the measurement qualities of a test often not considered?}\\ 3 main reasons}

\includegraphics[width=0.3\linewidth]{../Figures/Padlet_properties_qr_code.png}
\end{center}
```



## A new test
\small
Three sequences are read and then participants are asked to recall as many days as possible from each sequence.
\pause

Monday – Tuesday – Thursday – Saturday – Wednesday – Thursday – Tuesday

Thursday – Friday – Monday – Wednesday – Thursday – Thursday – Friday

Saturday – Wednesday – Tuesday – Monday

The entire block is repeated three times.


\pause
One point for each day recalled in the correct position (separately for each set of three sequences). The total score is the sum of items correctly recalled (in the correct position).
\pause

The test measures memory abilities. A score below 7 signals a deficit.

##
```{=latex}
\begin{center}
{\Large \textbf{What would be the main limitation of using this test?}}

\includegraphics[width=0.3\linewidth]{../Figures/Padlet_properties_qr_code.png}
\end{center}
```



##
```{=latex}
\begin{center}
{\Large \textbf{Write five characteristics you would use to choose a test}}

\includegraphics[width=0.3\linewidth]{../Figures/Padlet_properties_qr_code.png}
\end{center}
```

##

```{=latex}
\begin{center}
\includegraphics[width=0.4\linewidth]{../Figures/Padlet_properties_qr_code.png}
\end{center}
```
